  Log:

  are free under the terms of GPL and OFL.
  
  WWW: http://linuxlibertine.sourceforge.net/Libertine-EN.html
  
  PR:             ports/120774
  Submitted by:   Björn König <bkoenig at alpha-tierchen.de>
